commands.review_summary:
The PR threads sourceReplyDeliveryMode into local-model lean filtering and projections, keeps message for message_tool_only source replies, and aligns local-model/Ollama docs plus config help.

PR surface: Source +11, Tests +69, Docs 0. Total +80 across 9 files.

Reproducibility: yes. by source inspection: current main force-adds message for message_tool_only but then localModelLean can filter it out unconditionally. I did not execute a live reproduction in this read-only review.
commands.review_followup: - No automated repair is needed after the schema-help follow-up; this draft maintainer PR needs normal maintainer review and landing judgment.

target.title: fix(agents): keep message tool for lean source replies
target.body:
## Summary

- keep the `message` tool available in `localModelLean` when the current source reply contract is `message_tool_only`
- thread `sourceReplyDeliveryMode` through the local-model lean filter in agent tool construction and embedded-run tool projections
- update local-model/Ollama docs so lean mode is documented as preserving required message-tool delivery

## Verification

- `OPENCLAW_VITEST_MAX_WORKERS=1 node scripts/run-vitest.mjs run src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts --reporter=dot`
- `node_modules/.bin/oxfmt --check src/agents/local-model-lean.ts src/agents/agent-tools.ts src/agents/embedded-agent-runner/run/attempt.ts src/agents/local-model-lean.test.ts src/agents/agent-tools.model-provider-collision.test.ts`
- `node scripts/format-docs.mjs --check docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `node scripts/check-docs-mdx.mjs docs/concepts/experimental-features.md docs/gateway/local-models.md docs/providers/ollama.md`
- `git diff --check HEAD~1..HEAD`
- `.agents/skills/autoreview/scripts/autoreview --mode local` (`autoreview clean: no accepted/actionable findings reported`)
- Crabbox AWS `cbx_5597cbe46ca8`, run `run_ee0bf39ba03c`: `pnpm check:changed`, exit 0

## Real behavior proof

Behavior addressed: lean local-model mode no longer strips the required visible-reply delivery tool when a source turn is in `message_tool_only` mode.

Real environment tested: AWS Crabbox Linux runner `cbx_5597cbe46ca8` on the post-rebase branch; local focused Vitest through `scripts/run-vitest.mjs`.

Exact steps or command run after this patch: `pnpm check:changed` on Crabbox plus the focused local commands listed above.

Evidence after fix: `local-model-lean` and model-provider policy tests prove `message` is kept only for `message_tool_only`; Crabbox run `run_ee0bf39ba03c` passed with exit 0.

Observed result after fix: lean mode still drops `browser` and `cron`, still drops `message` for automatic delivery, and preserves `message` for message-tool-only source replies.

What was not tested: live Ollama/channel roundtrip for this exact patch; this is covered at the policy/filter layer and by the changed gate.
target.author: vincentkoc

commands.reason: PR is not opted into ClawSweeper autofix or automerge
